faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: How to use the app — for beginners and beyond
faq.rules_hint_sub: Fate Core, FAE and Book of Ashes — quick mechanic references

start.title: Getting Started
start.a1: Fate Characters is a tool for managing characters in tabletop RPGs using the Fate system. Create character sheets, track stress during play, and run campaigns with other players in real time.
start.a2: Click «+ Create» on the home screen, choose a system and fill in a name and aspects. Everything else can be added later. To play with others — create a campaign in the Campaigns tab.
start.a3: No. Everything works without an account — characters are stored in your browser. An account is only needed for syncing across devices and multiplayer campaigns.
start.a4: Yes. After the first visit the app is cached and works without internet. Data syncs automatically when you reconnect.
start.q5: How do I install it on my phone?
start.a5: iOS: Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen. Android: Chrome will prompt automatically or use Menu → Add to Home Screen.

characters.title: Characters
characters.q1: How do I create a character?
characters.a1: Click «+ Create» on the home screen or in the Characters tab. Choose a system, fill in a name, aspects and skills. Stunts and equipment can be added later.
characters.q2: How do I track stress during play?
characters.a2: Open the character, find the Stress section and click a box to mark it. For consequences, type text in the relevant field. Changes save automatically.
characters.q3: Where do I manage fate points?
characters.a3: Fate points are shown on the character sheet. Click «+» and «−» to spend and gain. Starting amount equals the refresh value (default 3).
characters.q4: What is the difference between a character and an NPC?
characters.a4: Characters are player characters. NPCs are non-player characters controlled by the GM. In a campaign the GM controls NPC visibility for players.
characters.q5: How do I share a character?
characters.a5: Open the character → Share button. Two link types: Import — recipient adds a copy; View Only — they see the sheet without editing.
characters.q6: How do I export / import a character?
characters.a6: Open character → disk icon → a JSON file downloads. To import — click the import icon on the home screen and select the file.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.a1: A shared space for the GM and players. All characters are visible in real time and the GM manages NPC visibility.
campaigns.q2: How do I create a campaign?
campaigns.a2: Campaigns tab → New Campaign. Choose a name, system and role — GM or Player. The role is set once at creation.
campaigns.a3: Enter the campaign room → Invite. A 6-character code and link appear. Send either to the player — they enter the code at /join.
campaigns.q4: How do I join a campaign?
campaigns.a4: Get the code from the GM → go to /join or use the invite link. An account is required. After joining the campaign appears with the Player role.
campaigns.q5: How do I assign a character to a campaign?
campaigns.a5: Open the Campaigns tab, expand the campaign and click «+ to campaign» next to your character.
campaigns.q6: Are stress updates visible in real time?
campaigns.a6: Yes. When a character is in a campaign and you are in the room — stress, consequences and fate points update instantly for everyone.
campaigns.q7: How does the GM control NPC visibility?
campaigns.a7: In the campaign room each NPC has Visible/Hidden and Fields buttons. By default NPCs are hidden from players.

sync.title: Sync
sync.a1: On sign-in local and server data are merged — the more recent version wins. When you change a character the data is sent to the server automatically.
sync.q2: How do I use multiple devices?
sync.a2: Sign into the same account on both devices. Data syncs on open. For an immediate update — press sync in the account menu.
sync.q3: I lost my data — what now?
sync.a3: If you have an account — sign in and press sync. If data was local only — it cannot be recovered. Export your characters regularly using the disk icon.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.hint: Looks like you wandered into an aspect-free zone

notes.label: Notes
notes.placeholder: Write something useful: story details, connections, plans, quotes...
notes.private: Notes are visible only to you

scars.label: Scars
scars.hint: A scar permanently replaces a character aspect. At the 4th scar the character becomes Darkness. Scars ignore the one-bonus rule — each gives +2 independently.

skill_advancement.title: Skill Advancement
skill_advancement.hint: Click + and − to change the rating. At −1 below zero the skill is removed.
